questions.model_answer:
In this Parcel Courier context, Route Planning starts with plan route with constraints: time windows, capacity, and risk points. and continues through perform pre-shift safety and documentation checks.. questions.question: Quantitative validation scenario (Parcel Courier, Route planning) while handling 'Deliver parcels on schedule': Food cost £4.50, selling price £14. What is gross food margin %?

calculation.prompt: Food cost £4.50, selling price £14. What is gross food margin %?
calculation.answer: Margin = (14 − 4.50) / 14 × 100 = 67.9%. Monitor against target; if labour is high, contribution still may be insufficient.

Link to total GP
